size.title: Choose Your Size
size.description: All necessary size information (ETRTO or Inch) can be found on your tire sidewall.

images.valveOverviewAlt: Schwalbe inner tube valve types and lengths overview

standard.title: Standard
standard.description: Reliable hold. Good purity rubber. Uniform wall thickness.

airPlus.title: Air Plus
airPlus.description: Thicker walls. Holds air longer. Better puncture protection.

extralight.title: Extralight / XXLight
extralight.description: Reduced weight for racing. Available in select sizes.

downhill.title: Downhill
downhill.description: Extremely robust. Reinforced base. Valve shear protection.
